description: Savings accounts must maintain a minimum monthly average balance to avoid penalties.
Customers can close accounts via branch or digital app after clearing dues.
Home loans offer financing up to 80% of property value with tenure up to 30 years.
Unsecured loans for personal use with minimal documentation.
Credit cards provide revolving credit with rewards and cashback options.
Interest is calculated daily on closing balance and credited quarterly.
Loans may have fixed or floating interest rates based on benchmark rates.
Customers must complete KYC using valid ID and address proof before account activation.
Transactions are monitored for suspicious patterns to prevent money laundering.
Customer complaints must be resolved within 3 working days.
Personal loans are approved within 24–48 hours after document verification.
UPI transactions are limited to ₹1,00,000 per day.
KYC (Know Your Customer) is a mandatory process to verify customer identity.

topic: How to reset mobile banking password?
description: Users can reset password via app using OTP verification.
